subcodes.title: Interview with president of Alliance Spiritualiste, Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-26
subcodes.first_line: You must sow the seed of love. They destroy, you construct. They take life, you confer life.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @war and peace, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the power of words; of speech
